case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DEVON VINING

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VINING, DEVON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-05-2015

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINING, DEVON $1,129.99 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,413.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15246031)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15113028), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED APR-20-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VINING, DEVON
